libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 2.0.0, generated tests must use the jakarta.activation package namespace, not javax.activation. Do not add javax.activation compatibility dependencies to make old 1.2.1 tests compile; port tests to the Jakarta namespace and exercise public API paths such as CommandInfo, DataHandler, MimetypesFileTypeMap, or MailcapCommandMap.

deterministic_setup.reason: The jakarta.activation-api 2.0.0 POM states it is only intended for compile-time use and excludes implementation-specific classes. Runtime use of activation registries fails with NoClassDefFoundError for com.sun.activation.registries without the matching implementation artifact.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The implementation artifact also contains jakarta.activation classes, so keep the version matched to 2.0.0 to avoid API/implementation skew.
Existing 1.2.1 tests import javax.activation and will not compile against 2.0.0 unless rewritten for the Jakarta namespace.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The resolved jakarta.activation-api 2.0.0 artifact is API-only and has no Maven dependencies, but normal runtime paths such as MimetypesFileTypeMap/MailcapCommandMap reference com.sun.activation.registries classes that are absent from the API JAR; the matching implementation artifact is needed for meaningful coverage.
